raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The City of Torrance and Sonoma Technology will be receiving $3 million to install refinery air quality monitors and upgrades to the community emergency alert system.",
    "Assemblymember Muratsuchi has introduced a package of bills to make refineries safer in California.",
    "AB 1645 will ban the use of Hydrofluoric Acid at California refineries.",
    "AB 1646 requires refineries to maintain a publicly accessible risk management plan including emergency notifications to residents.",
    "AB 1647 will require that refineries install and maintain air quality monitors at fence-line and in the community, with real-time reporting of readings.",
    "AB 1648 increases the number of refinery inspectors at Cal/OSHA.",
    "AB 1649 will codify and make permanent the existing Interagency Refinery Task Force."
  ]
}
```
